sections.subtitle: Current Form
sections.text: Olympique de Marseille are in strong form with 3 wins and 1 draw in their last 5 matches, scoring 13 goals. Stade Rennais have had mixed results with 3 wins and 2 losses, but they’ve shown attacking intent by scoring 11 goals in the same period.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In the last two encounters between these teams, each side has won once. Marseille secured a 2-1 victory in the most recent match, while Rennes won 2-0 at home in the earlier fixture.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Marseille, sitting 2nd in the league, boast a potent attack with 70 goals scored this season, ranking 2nd. Rennes, positioned 11th, have scored 49 goals but struggle defensively, conceding 46 compared to Marseille’s 45.

sections.subtitle: Key Players
sections.text: Mason Greenwood (Marseille) has been exceptional with 19 goals, while Amine Gouiri is in great form with 6 goals in the last 5 matches. For Rennes, Arnaud Kalimuendo’s 17 goals and recent form (4 goals in 5 matches) make him a threat.

sections.subtitle: Match Dynamics
sections.text: Marseille’s superior league position, home advantage at Orange Velodrome, and attacking depth give them an edge. Rennes’ inconsistency and defensive vulnerabilities might be exploited, though they’ve shown capability to score against strong sides.
